zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Norreys於1481年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir William Norreys40歲，母親Anne Horne11478歲。她和Sir John Langford至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世在英國波克夏阿爾德沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Norreys于1481年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir William Norreys40岁，母亲Anne Horne11478岁。她和Sir John Langford至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世在英国波克夏阿爾德沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Norreys was born in 1481, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Norreys, was 40 and her mother, Anne Horne, was 11478. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Sir John Langford. She died in Aldworth, Berkshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Norreys(이)가 1481년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Norreys(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Horne(은)는 11478세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Langford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 버크실르 알드워스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Norreys родилась в 1481 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Norreys было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Horne, 11478. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Sir John Langford. Она умерла в местности алдворт, биркшир, Англия.
